slug.description: kebab-case; names the integration branch karta/<slug>/integration and the wave tags

title.description: human-friendly binder name shown as the Karta Watch headline, e.g. 'Tag editing for notes' (the slug stays the technical id)

summary.description: plain-language goal, 1-2 sentences: what this binder delivers and why it matters; reader-facing (distinct from 'motivation', the terse internal why)

source.description: path to the source design/prototype, or null

after.description: slugs of binders that must merge before this one — the cross-binder dependency the suggested run order is derived from; the order itself is never stored

sme.description: ids of advisory SME packs auto-matched at plan time; the Review checklist of each is the enforceable subset the safety-auditor judges (project-local .karta/sme/<id>.md overrides the built-in references/sme/<id>.md)

token_manifest.description: shared design-token map; present only when a token system exists

command.description: the project's own test/dev env command

supports_isolation.description: whether the command accepts injectable isolation params

cwd.description: worktree-relative directory the command runs in; default is the worktree root

runtime_contract.description: required language/toolchain runtimes the project's commands need; present only when a runtime floor exists

name.description: runtime/toolchain, e.g. node, python, go, ruby, rust

manager.description: version manager that pins it, e.g. nvm, mise, asdf, volta, pyenv

on_unavailable.description: policy when a required runtime is absent: halt and report. karta does not provision runtimes on its own.

summary.description: plain-language goal, one sentence: what this work item does

contract.description: the open-shape interface this item exposes/consumes

touches.description: files/paths this item creates or modifies (concrete paths, directory prefixes, or globs all match); drives the parallelism file-collision + shared-resource gates and the validator's same-wave overlap check

command.description: the CI-facing check karta runs; floor is compile/type-check/lint

cwd.description: worktree-relative directory the command runs in; default is the worktree root
